profile.name: MORGAN
profile.subtitle: Big load of old Crap
profile.headline: Hi I'm Byron, a Creative & Adaptable Developer.
paragraphs: Looking for an <mark>Interesting</mark> new Position to broaden my development skills.
Experience has taught me that one of the most useful skills to have is Adaptability, to help you take on new challenges & grow.
Please feel free to check out some <mark>Live Demo's</mark> of my work or view the code directly on my <mark>Github page</mark>.

skillsSection.title: Skills
paragraphs: Soon to Qualify, having completed a <mark>1-Year</mark> Full-Time Intensive <mark>MERN Stack</mark> Development course, at the DCI in Berlin.
Currently I'm working hard on a 2-Month long, team project and learning <mark>NEXT.js</mark> in the process.

moreSection.title: More...
paragraphs: Originally from a small town in Wales, my natural curiosity has led me on a journey that includes a <mark>PhD in Physics</mark> and working in diverse areas such as Satellite Phones, OLED Displays and PC-ram.
I've lived & worked in the UK, Holland and currently <mark>Dresden Germany</mark>, where I've embarked on the latest chapter of this continuing journey, in Web Development.
If you have any questions or just want more information then please contact me or just say Hello.
